=== basic
# Unfocused button.
widget: button
title: Button
width: 16
height: 3
label: OK
===
╔═ Button ═════╗
║[ OK ]        ║
╚══════════════╝

=== long_label
# Button with a longer label.
widget: button
title: Button
width: 20
height: 3
label: Confirm
===
╔═ Button ═════════╗
║[ Confirm ]       ║
╚══════════════════╝

=== focused
# Focused button — rendered with highlight colours.
widget: button
title: Button
width: 16
height: 3
label: OK
focused: true
===
╔═ Button ═════╗
║[ OK ]        ║
╚══════════════╝
